title: Paint-stroke Emitter rendering (factoryID=19 + Cell copy 20) subsystem
goal: CONFIRMED DECODE (T-qslidein001 census): Slide_In's Gradient generator (factoryID=8) hosts 10 Emitters (factoryID=19) each with a 'Cell copy' (factoryID=20) -- this is why census flags it [PAINT-STROKE]. There IS an emitter PARSER (engine/src/parser/emitter.ts, parseEmitterParams -> EmitterParams in types.ts) but NO emitter RENDERING in the compositor (only a field-proxy exists for Stylized/Nature particle fields, see compositor/filters/evidence/PARTICLE_EMITTER_DIAGNOSIS.md). The 'Rounded rect up' mask is an Emitter host (paint-stroke brush), distinct from 'Rounded rect down' (gradient fill). Build: a paint-stroke emitter rasteriser (brush profile stamped along the emitter source shape / Cell copy). This is the largest of the 3 subsystems and likely tail-frame relevant (B settle + emitter overlay). Reuse the existing EmitterParams parser. Must fire on >=2 built-ins (no per-transition hardcode). Gate net-positive vs GUI GT. Also note: engine does not settle on photo B at the tail (f23 GT = cool blue photo B, engine still shows sepia A) -- likely a separate retime/settle issue worth a follow-up if not fixed by subsystems 1-3.
